scenarios.title: Frame Formats & Wire Efficiency
scenarios.description: Side-by-side frame anatomy in classic 4-byte columns for FC-2, Ethernet II, and OCP ESUN. Click any field for spec detail. Watch the overhead waterfall change as you vary payload size, message size, and link variant — see why 8GFC's 8b/10b costs 20% on the wire while 16GFC's 64b/66b costs only 3%. Endianness and wire-time views included.
